# uptimekuma_monitor_gamedig (Data Source)

Get GameDig game server monitor information by ID or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a GameDig game server monitor by name
data "uptimekuma_monitor_gamedig" "minecraft_server" {
  name = "Minecraft Server"
}

# Look up a GameDig game server monitor by ID
data "uptimekuma_monitor_gamedig" "by_id" {
  id = 42
}

# Use the data source to reference an existing monitor
output "minecraft_server_hostname" {
  value = data.uptimekuma_monitor_gamedig.minecraft_server.hostname
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier
- `name` (String) Monitor name

### Read-Only

- `game` (String) Game type identifier (e.g. minecraft, csgo)
- `gamedig_given_port_only` (Boolean) Use only the given port without auto-detection
- `hostname` (String) Game server IP address or hostname
- `port` (Number) Game server port
